title: Retinted: Nature's Spirit Waters
description: Retints Waters of Nature's Spirit biomes. (REQUIRES POLYTONE MOD) Part of the Retinted resource packs series.
body:
Recolors all of Nature's Spirit's water to be a softer blue.
This goes with the Retinted: Vanilla Waters resource pack. These water colors may look out of place when used without it!
All nature's spirit biomes except non-mountain snowy biomes and swamps have their their water color changed.

**Check out the Gallery for pictures.**

## _This Resource Pack Requires the Polytone mod to work!_
Polytone is a mod that allows resource pack creators to edit more things than usual, like water colors. I have also heard that Optifine works but I have not tested it.
